description.value: Price 30,000 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 4 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION A ring of curved fangs circles the tip of this 7-foot-long bone staff. When magic mouth is cast from the staff, the resulting illusory mouth is filled with countless needle-like fangs. After magic mouth is cast, one charge remains drained from the staff and canât be recharged until the user dismisses the spell or until the spell discharges. When casting beast shape I from the staff, the caster can choose only creatures with bite attacks, and the userâs bite attacks deal damage as if the assumed shape were two sizes larger. The staff allows the use of the following spells. Magic mouth (1 charge) Beast shape I (see text; 2 charges) Hungry pit (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 15,500 gp; Feats Craft Staff; Spells beast shape I, hungry pit, magic mouth
